query: SELECT u.id as studiosUserId, u.riffUserId, u.name, cf.id as freqId, cf.frequencyName, cf.arcType, LEFT(cf.synthesisFingerprint, 150) as fp_preview, LEFT(CAST(cf.vocabularyJson AS CHAR), 200) as vocab_preview FROM users u LEFT JOIN creator_frequencies cf ON cf.userId = u.id AND cf.isDefault = 1 WHERE u.riffUserId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.3c7bc1be8a03 --database WKX2kfVZUM23yKDCoTqGRN --execute SELECT u.id as studiosUserId, u.riffUserId, u.name, cf.id as freqId, cf.frequencyName, cf.arcType, LEFT(cf.synthesisFingerprint, 150) as fp_preview, LEFT(CAST(cf.vocabularyJson AS CHAR), 200) as vocab_preview FROM users u LEFT JOIN creator_frequencies cf ON cf.userId = u.id AND cf.isDefault = 1 WHERE u.riffUserId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY u.id;
